init_hook: if [ "${CI:-false}" != true ] && [ ! -f .env ]; then echo 'Local environment is not initialized; run: devbox run setup' >&2; fi

setup: export APP_ENV=local APP_DEBUG=true APP_URL=http://localhost:8000 DB_URL= DB_CONNECTION=pgsql DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT="$PGPORT" DB_DATABASE=holizuki DB_USERNAME=holizuki DB_PASSWORD= DB_SSLMODE=disable
if ! grep -Eq '^APP_KEY=base64:.+' .env; then php artisan key:generate --no-interaction; fi
if ! pg_isready --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki --quiet; then devbox services start postgresql; fi
for attempt in $(seq 1 30); do pg_isready --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki --quiet && break; sleep 1; done

psql --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki --dbname=postgres --tuples-only --no-align --command="SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'holizuki'" | grep -qx 1 || createdb --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki holizuki
dev: export APP_ENV=local APP_DEBUG=true APP_URL=http://localhost:8000 DB_URL= DB_CONNECTION=pgsql DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT="$PGPORT" DB_DATABASE=holizuki DB_USERNAME=holizuki DB_PASSWORD= DB_SSLMODE=disable
if ! pg_isready --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki --quiet; then devbox services start postgresql; fi
pg_isready --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki --dbname=holizuki --quiet || { echo 'PostgreSQL is not initialized; run: devbox run setup' >&2; exit 1; }
doctor: export APP_ENV=local APP_DEBUG=true APP_URL=http://localhost:8000 DB_URL= DB_CONNECTION=pgsql DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT="$PGPORT" DB_DATABASE=holizuki DB_USERNAME=holizuki DB_PASSWORD= DB_SSLMODE=disable

php -r '$required = ["curl", "dom", "fileinfo", "intl", "mbstring", "pcntl", "pdo_pgsql", "pdo_sqlite", "sockets", "sodium", "xml", "xmlwriter", "xdebug", "zip"]; $missing = array_values(array_filter($required, static fn (string $extension): bool => ! extension_loaded($extension))); if ($missing !== []) { fwrite(STDERR, "Missing PHP extensions: ".implode(", ", $missing).PHP_EOL); exit(1); }'
scripts.browser:install: if [ "$(uname -s)" = Linux ]; then npm run browser:install:ci; else npm run browser:install; fi
